items.title: Electricity Price Index Methodology
items.description: Methodology for Electricity Price Index calculations and interpretation.

items.title: Value Score Methodology
items.description: Methodology for Value Score composition and tier assignment.

items.title: Freshness Scoring Methodology
items.description: Methodology for data freshness status and recency labels.

items.title: CAGR Methodology
items.description: Compound annual growth rate methodology for long-horizon rate trends.

items.title: Volatility Index Methodology
items.description: Coefficient of variation methodology for rate volatility over a window.

items.title: Price Trend Methodology
items.description: Annualized linear trend methodology for electricity price growth.

items.title: Momentum Signal Methodology
items.description: Directional historical signal for electricity price trend direction.

items.title: Affordability Rankings
items.description: Deterministic affordability ranking across normalized states.

items.title: Value Score Rankings
items.description: Deterministic value score ranking across normalized states.

items.title: Rate Rankings (Low to High)
items.description: Deterministic ranking of average state rates from lowest to highest.

items.title: Rate Rankings (High to Low)
items.description: Deterministic ranking of average state rates from highest to lowest.

items.title: Most Affordable Electricity by State
items.description: States ranked by estimated monthly electricity bill at 900 kWh. Lower bill = more affordable.

items.title: Least Affordable Electricity by State
items.description: States ranked by estimated monthly electricity bill at 900 kWh. Higher bill = less affordable.

items.title: 25-Year Rate Growth (CAGR)
items.description: Compound annual growth rate of residential electricity rates over ~25 years. Higher = faster rate growth.

items.title: 5-Year Rate Volatility
items.description: Coefficient of variation (stdev/mean) of monthly rates over the last 5 years. Higher = more volatile.

items.title: Electricity Price Trend Ranking
items.description: States where electricity prices are rising the fastest.

items.title: Electricity Price Momentum Signal Ranking
items.description: States where electricity prices are accelerating, rising, stable, or falling.

items.title: 1-Year Electricity Inflation Ranking
items.description: States ranked by 1-year electricity price increase. Higher = faster price growth.

items.title: 5-Year Electricity Inflation Ranking
items.description: States ranked by 5-year electricity price increase. Higher = faster price growth.

items.title: AI Energy Vertical Knowledge
items.description: Stub machine-readable page for AI-energy vertical navigation and references.
